---
title: "Contact"
toc: false
page-layout: full
anchor-sections: false
body-classes: "titre-page"
---

## Get in Touch

I am currently looking for a **work-study contract (alternance)** starting September 2026 in a MOA, AMOA, or PMO role, ideally in the health, pharma, or MedTech sector.

Feel free to reach out for any opportunity or collaboration.

::: {.callout-tip}
## Best way to reach me
I typically respond within 24 hours.
:::

| | |
|---|---|
| {{< fa envelope >}} Email | [aurеlieblumenfeld@gmail.com](mailto:aurelieblumenfeld@gmail.com) |
| {{< fa brands linkedin >}} LinkedIn | [linkedin.com/in/aurelie-blumenfeld](https://fr.linkedin.com/in/aurélie-blumenfeld-6b6335291) |
| {{< fa file-pdf >}} CV | [Download my CV](../CV_aurelieblumenfeld.pdf) |

## Location

Based in **Paris, France** , open to remote and hybrid opportunities.
